reviews.review_text: Lovely caravan park beautifuly kept grounds and amenities the cleanest we've seen in Tasmania
Good place for a short stay.
Highly recommend this place. The cabin is well equipped, and newly furnished in modern style.

We based ourselves here for 4 nights to explore the area like Wineglass Bay, Ross, Campbell Town etc. The caravan sites are very well maintained, spacious & flat & the amenities were very clean. Well located within an easy walk to town.
The most loveliest lady at the front desk! Really good amenities & everything all clean!

We stayed here for a night in our motorhome and it was a really great stop along the east coast. The park is in a beautiful location, nice and close to the water, and everything felt clean and well looked after.

The staff were extremely friendly and helpful, which made the whole experience even better.

Amenities were good and the sites were easy to access, which made it stress-free arriving and setting up. It was also a perfect base to explore the surrounding area and break up the drive.

Would definitely stay again, especially if you’re doing the east coast loop.
We absolutely loved our stay here. It’s very quiet, the toilet is spotless, and the shower room is spacious. Amenities and location are excellent. Highly recommend this place for a comfortable stay.
Stayed for three nights in caravan, site was good, amnesties very clean camp kitchen excellent well done to the staff. Enjoyed our stay.
This place is wonderful.

Very friendly and approachable staff. They're very accommodating and welcoming. Good location close to Coles Bay without the price tag of closer to the National Park.

The little cabin is cosy, comfortable and well equipped. Right on the beach and very close to the centre of Swansea. It would be a great base for a number of days in the area.

Great holiday park to stay at! Lovely and helpful owners go out of their way to accommodate your needs. Holiday park is well run, clean and quiet. Hot showers and kitchen are kept spotless clean. I hugely enjoyed my stay and will be back!
Such a great spot lovely sites right near the beach with a view to die for nice clean and modern amenities and facilities great stay
We spent 1 night here after exploring Freycinet National Park. It had everything we needed for a simple and comfortable stay. Right next to the beach too which was lovely.
Close to the beach and town. All was well set out and clean and tidy. Strongly recommend

Great spot in the city near Spencer St station.
Staff very friendly good food. Comfy lounge are

We were booked in a cabin and were pleasantly surprised by the space. A tiny home set with forward thinking of utilising every space! 🏠 Inside is a master bedroom, a single room, bathroom, full kitchen, couch and dining table with a porch. We only stayed the one night but it was very comfy and so easy to spread out. Awesomely convenient that the beach was just a pathway away too, great for fresh morning dip 🏖️🏊‍♀️
Was there in a Camper van with family. Used powered spot. Facilities are clean and well maintained. Nice spot in front of the beach (just have to cross the road). Basic groceries 2min out.
Very clean, comfortable and relaxing place to stay. Very short walk to water and town. Highly recommended 👌

Occupation des bungalows 27 et 28, pendant une nuit.|Les plus :|Bon accueil, bien situé juste à côté de la plage, emplacement de stationnement dédié, bungalow très propre et petites touches d'attentions pour les occupants, possibilité de faire de la cuisine.|Le site est très bien tenu.|Accès direct à la plage depuis le holiday park.|Ambiance familiale très appréciable.|Une amélioration :|Les bungalows pourraient être plus grand ou équipés de lits superposés pour pouvoir accueillir les familles de 4 sans être séparés dans 2 bungalows différents.

Wir standen 4 Nächte hier. Es ist ein sehr guter Platz. Die Anlage ist sehr sauber und gepflegt. Die Sanitäranlagen sind super, groß, geräumig, genug Ablagen und Haken um was aufzuhängen. Die Waschmaschinen sind ebenfalls sehr gut, sogar mit heißem Wasser. Das Campkitchen ist auch in einem einwandfreien Zustand. |Super ist auch die Nähe zur Stadt und der herrliche Weg am Meer entlang zur Stadt.|Wir empfehlen den Park zu 100 % weiter. Danke Wir hatten eine schöne Zeit hier.|Preis Leistungsverhältnis ist okay.

Outstanding immaculately clean bathrooms. Got to use the keys provided upon checking in. Hot shower is fantastic. There are toilet brush for toilet, which is essential to keep the toilet ckean for next users. Booking online and check-in process is a breeze even at after hours. Good view of night sky.

BEWARE THE HOLIDAYING PUBLIC
If you book at this park in holiday time and don’t give 30 days notice to cancel, they keep your deposit even though we cancelled 7 days before arrival
This is the sort of shonky behaviour l would expect from a third rate Gold Coast park, not in Tassie
VERY DISAPPOINTING BEHAVIOUR

We tried to cancel the day after we booked due to change of circumstances.We paid $130 for two sites seven days in advance. And they wouldn't refund a cent. Absolutely disgusting  You'd think we were in the shonkiest place in Tasmania. Do not stay, there if you don't want to be ripped off. Disgraceful thievery
2 bed chalet was very small but clean and quiet. Beach access at back of park.

Simple, clean, great beachside location... easy 1 hour drive to Freycinet National Park, where there are some lovely walks. Supermarket in the nearby town, plus eating options. Not too much available on a Sunday evening though,  so plan ahead for that.
Holiday Park is small, well spaced, beautifully maintained and has everything needed for either a long or short stay. Mobile home was very clean and tidy. Welcome was warm, even if the weather wasn't!

Visited this holiday park recently and had a great experience. 4 people in 1 motorhome. This place was perfect, had everything we needed for 1 night to recharge and have a hot shower. Facilities were great and all very clean. Lovely indoor common area too !! :) laundry with driers worked well too. Campsite is easy to find and in a beautiful location right on the beach :)

We only stayed one night at this campsite, but I absolutely loved it. There are a few small shops just outside the park, which is really convenient. The showers and toilets are super clean and spacious, and as soon as you step out of the car you can hear the sound of the ocean and the waves. The amenity area and kitchen are also very cozy and spotless. Hot shower are amazing and nice. We really enjoyed our stay here and wish we could come back again next time. 🌊🏕️✨
The best kept caravan park we visited in Tassie in one month. Our cabin was nice and even had a lounge room.
Great setting for a cute and cosy park. Friendly staff. The grounds and amenities are kept to a high standard which makes the stay even better. A visit from the ducks is very special.

Well maintained caravan park amenities top shelf were self contained but if your travelling light would be a fantastic stop for a while.
The ducks will greet you on arrival if there not to tired out.

the caravan park was clean, BUT management put us in the middle of 5 caravans that where friend that drank and swore all day and night, the van on our right, the boy bangs his head into the caravan from 12.00pm till 5.00am it was like a bass drum. I just spoke to Blake at the caravan park reception, and he hung up on me. very disappointed and will never stay there again, Management knew these people where all friends. BUT they still put us right in the middle of them to fill up the space.
This site is a smaller very professional run, highly manicured , spotlessly clean campsite. Would recommend to family and friends without hesitation
Expensive..not good

Best stay we had during our trip - we stayed in one of the cabins. Had everything we needed, including all basic cooking utensils, electric and spare blankets, and most importantly, cute ducks that roamed around. Fantastic location as well and we had access to a lovely, quiet beach a minute away. Around 40 minutes from Freycinet National Park if you’re keen for a hike. Highly recommend!
No other park I've been in is as clean and neat. Amenities and grounds are always top notch and the staff are so helpful and friendly.
Great spot and our small campervan fit in well. Helpful staff and very clean amenities. Very reasonably priced for a powered site.

Location is perfect, walking tracks all around the lake. Beautiful sunsets. |My site was not in the best condition, grass & gravel and when I arrived it had cigarette butts everywhere. Disgusting. Amenities ok. I paid $162 for 1 person in a Hiace van for 3 nights. Getting costly. Parks should give solo travellers a discount

Beautiful little park, everything neat as a pin. Don't expect bouncy pillows etc, it's more a grey nomads park. Dog friendly, dog wash station, dog washing and drying machines, such a great idea. We will definitely return
Awesome Park amenities were super clean
Parked motorhome on level ground, which is always great, good amenities,  quiet and peaceful with a short walk to beach and town.
Great spot and perfect for beach access.

Nice quiet on the beach... no views but just a short walk away.
Good outdoor bbq area and an indoor one also.. we didnt use the laundry facilities but they looked great.   Dog wash on site.   We will come back.

Lots of cabins and powered sites. Bathroom had a heater which is very good in winter to take the chill off. A list of local businesses was given out and when they were open which was very helpful. I stayed at a few places in Tassie and this was the only place which gave this out.
Such a cute spot! Right by ocean can hear waves in cabins. Very clean and neat. Lovely little jar of chocolates and shortbread bikkies as welcoming gift. Will be back for sure!!
Great staff, amenities are good.
Great park, with friendly staff and clean amenities
The room was clean and comfortable. The beach at the end of the property presented us with a lovely walk.

Very quaint caravan park. Clean amenities.  Staff very pleasant. Easy walk to the town centre. Clean camp kitchen. Grass under,vans, and when you sign in they offer you a mat to put outside your door. Saves taking grass into the van Lovely walk to the area out the back gate to the left where you can walk up the hill and look at the view. Well worth a look (don't forget to take a snack and if your lucky claim the seat up the top of the hill)|Recommend|

What a gem! All the previous 5/5 reviews are spot on. Our cabin was beautifully appointed and absolutely spotless.I loved the little  touches that really added to the ambience and the delightful complimentary cookies! Lovely little gift shop ( gorgeous earrings)and a friendly welcome. We were even invited to help ourselves to the lettuce in the parks garden!! Thanks so much for a truly lovely stay.

This is a nicely managed holiday park on Bridges Street in Swansea. We recently stayed here for one night, reserved a couple days advance online. Check-in was very quick, we were given property map, instructions and important information and were hooking up at our powered site in just a few minutes after arrival. ||Grounds are nice with decent spacing between vehicle spots. Community kitchen, toilets, showers and laundry were just behind reception in the centre of the holiday park. You can exit the back on foot and walk the coastline and are only a few minutes drive from the town centre. ||Overall, this is a good little holiday park convenient if travelling up the east coast and looking for a place around Swansea. We'd happily stay here again.

This is a nicely managed holiday park on Bridges Street in Swansea. We recently stayed here for one night, reserved a couple days advance online. Check-in was very quick, we were given property map, instructions and important information and were hooking up at our powered site in just a few minutes after arrival.

Grounds are nice with decent spacing between vehicle spots. Community kitchen, toilets, showers and laundry were just behind reception in the centre of the holiday park. You can exit the back on foot and walk the coastline and are only a few minutes drive from the town centre.

Overall, this is a good little holiday park convenient if travelling up the east coast and looking for a place around Swansea. We'd happily stay here again.
Great location with direct access to the beach. Very clean toilet with hot showers.
Fabulous spot.

Super clean and well maintained park.
Friendly park manager and nice accomodation

Amazing.  Laundry facilities,  can get cash from reception.  From the common room you can hear the ocean, while relaxing on the lounge with a book. Book exchange here too with DVD'S as well. Plenty of sites. Rain hail or shine best place to be with the duck pond down the road. Close to the city centre beach only through a gate.

Our first time here, we will definitely be back. We used a powered caravan site for our 19foot off road caravan. Gravel pad for van and enough room for our MUX to park with grass section right next to it, nice and level and very well maintained throughout the whole facility. Easy to connect to power and water. Loads of room to turn around with ease for both large and small vehicles. Friendly and helpful lady who assisted us, gave us an easy spot to get into as we are novice caravan owners. All spots to be reversed into. Toilets, kitchen, all facilities, can't fault, clean and well maintained with free wifi. Worth what you pay. Walk through gate to get to the beach. Our 2 labradors absolutely loved it. Very quiet spot, listen to sound of the waves, quiet area considering its right in the heart of suburbia. Highly recommend this place.

The location was absolutely stunning and so conveniently placed right at the ocean front and so close to the shops. The team was absolutely lovely to deal with and super accommodating. One of the cleaning ladies was so so kind.
Unfortunately the grounds don't seem to be very child-friendly. There's no playground or area for children to play. Signs up saying no ball games anywhere, and if they want to ride their bike it has to be on the road where cars drive. Really unfortunate as that made the trip a lot less enjoyable for the kids at times we were winding down at the cabin. The other thing is the cabins were so small, you couldn't even close the door to the main bedroom because the bed was in the way. The toilet is in with the bathroom so with 4 people in a single cabin, you constantly had to wait on each to use the toilet because even the communal toilets were locked to everyone other than caravan stayers. The beds were also incredibly uncomfortable... such a shame because location and team were fantastic!!

The Swansea Holiday Park is beautiful maintained, clean and well located. It's also dog friendly. Its very close the beach and Swansea Dog parks, and walking distance to everything within Swansea. Its a quiet location and the facilities some of the best we've experienced.

We were in a caravan.  The sites are very spacious , gravel to park van on and grass for under your awning.  One of the nicer parks we have stayed in . Spotless amenities.  Great camp kitchen.  Just off the beach .
Smal cozy cabins, parking just outside, all essential equipments available and worth for the price.

This park is extremely well maintained throughout. The park grounds are well surfaced with grass and road base so not tracking dirt into our van. The amenities are super clean and well maintained. Common areas are well equipped and very comfortable. Probably one of the best quality parks we’ve stayed at on our trip.

Kleiner, gut gelegener Campingplatz direkt am Meer. Die Toiletten  und Duschen sind sehr modern und sauber. Es gibt auch eine kleine BBQ-Ecke. Die Stadt kann man gut zu Fuß erkunden. Einen Spielplatz, Geschäfte und kleine Restaurants sind in ca 10min zu Fuß zu erreichen.
Awesome for a quick holiday 😎

We have stayed in more than 150 caravan parks on our travels around Australia in recent years and both of us agreed that Swansea Holiday Park would be in the top half dozen!  This place is magnificent - perfect location next to the beach, green grassy sites, and lovely new amenities. Congratulations to the owners in providing such a delightful place!

An absolute pleasure to stay here.
Immaculate showers and toilets.
The layout and maintenance of the sites was exceptional.

Swansea Holiday Park was our favourite stay in Tassie. The staff are so friendly, informative and happy to help. The facilities were great and so clean - the cleanest park I've ever been to. Their information sheet was above and beyond. Perfect location right on the beach and beautiful spot to holiday. We will definitely be back!

We had a cabin so my comment is on the cabin.
Good location close to the beach but the big colourbond fence blocks out any view.
A raised deck near the common area would be great.
Cabin was clean and comfortable albeit somewhat basic.

Très bon camping avec des bungalow
Bien équipé
We stayed in one of their cabins. I had been a little spoiled with our accommodation prior to arriving here. It was basic but clean and functional.

We have been to a few caravan parks over the last few days and this one has been the best by far. Large clean showers and toilets. Kitchen / lounge very inviting and plenty of space as well as a great undercover bbq kitchen area. Oh and coffee machine with delicious hot choc! |Easy access to a beautiful beach. |We rate this one as a must not miss! |Thanks so much for providing a safe spacious park.
Good location, average amenities

Beautiful camping, very clean and organized! The kitchen is very cozy, the bbq area tidy and functional; the beach is very close as well.
Highly recommended!
Loved it

Stayed here for one night  great location beach 2 minutes away town 5 minutes away accommodation spotless and clean facilities great lovely owner run very professional  could not fault the place would stay here again  great spot to stay so handy for everything
Great location and very comfortable well maintained cabins

The best facilities. ..beautiful clean bathrooms.. never have we seen a camp kitchen like this one. It's like a gorgeous Cafe.  Green grass sites..a real change from dusty dirt ones. The ocean is across the road n a lovely dog park n a easy walk around the headlands. There's even a doggy wash. N the office lady is soo lovely. This park is the best one we have been to on our holiday.
Have only one complaint and that is no broom or dust pan the is that they never warned us that the water wouldbecutoff.

Saw lots of good comments with sparkling clean, so had our expectations high before we get there. When we got there it definitely exceeded our expectations - It is absolutely the cleanest holiday park we have ever seen, probably cleaner and neater than my own house lol highly recommend!!
PS After hours check in was easy and smooth too

We arrived quite late in the afternoon. The reception lady was quite accommodating. She had great knowledge of the local area and also chose to praise and recommend local businesses. The amenities were clean, and couldn't fault anything. What I did have a laugh at was the excessive amount of signs around the park. Alot of strict rules when it comes to outdoor play. Strictly no ball games. We chose not to kick the football as we were scared of being told off. Nice and close to everything with fantastic beach access.

We stayed at four caravan parks in our latest 12-day Tasmanian trip. This is the best and cleanest. The patch of lawn next to every site is such a considerate and wonderful feature. Instead of stepping into our camper van with sand each time, our camper van floor remained clean thanks to the lawn. All the facilities are clean - definitely the cleanest amongst the four we used and some of the others have higher ratings.

Amazing place. Right on the beach, very useful amenities and so clean. Lovely owners, couldn't have been more helpful. We stayed in our campercar/rooftop tent (no mats/plastic/tent extras allowed to touch the floor) and was good to have a bit of luxury on our trip. Highly recommend. 1 hr from Freycinet national park and walks, beautiful drives and things to see along the way.
Very clean site, alot of space and communal cooking areas are amazing.
מקום יפה נקי ומטופח ביקרנו עם אוטוקראוון

Couldn't fault it !  I had to change my booking, but since I had done it through a 3rd party it was not so simple. Janelle was a godsend...gave me all the info I needed to guide me through it without cost to myself. A hint...book direct !!  Clean, great views

Extremely uncouth owners.
We had a leak in our bathroom in the morning and are also travelling with a 10 month old baby. Thus, we checked out 30mn late in the morning. As soon as 10am, the owner came to see us to very rudely and with a moralizing tone, threaten to charge us $50 extra. He forced us to unplug our water and give our keys back right away as if we were thieves.
We were late but that does not allow for disrespect and rudeness.
I’ve stayed on many campgrounds and it’s the first time I see that! Appalling!
Dont expect these people to be understanding if you have a problem. They obviously chase profits and hate people.

We booked the Swansea holiday park for our family of three for the weekend as we were having a family get together in swansea. Other family members also booked here. ||Friday night we arrived with trouble checking in and finding the place, i called reception, only to be swore at... i got “your in the wrong f'ing place” “your in f'ing New South Wales not Tasmania” amongst other things and the rest of the conversation was just utterly rude then i was hung upon. Looked for alternative accomdation but everything was booked out. When we got to reception to check in (which was later than all the other amazing places in Swansea some other family members stayed at) no one was there or answered the door. ||Sunday morning we went out in our boat and had trouble with flat battery issues so we were going to be late checking out. Once again, my conversation with reception was absolutely disgusting! I tried to explain my situation and apologise, was willing to oay an extra fee for later check out but the horrible, abusive woman wouldn't even here me out. She cut me off, swore again, told me she didn't care and to come get my stuff out now!! Then hung up. I have never in my life experienced such horrible and traumatising abuse. While we were cleaning the cabin and getting our stuff out a guy knocked on the door for me to open it to him abruptly asking “what are you doing” I tell him I’m getting our stuff and cleaning the cabin so we can give the keys back. he very abruptly replied with “I’m on a time limit ( as he’s tapping his watch)  get your sh** together and get out!, don’t worry about cleaning it, I’ve got stuff to do” and stormed off swearing and abusing me 😭 ||Other family members staying there at the same time had similar experiences with the rudeness and the language.||I would NOT recommend staying here! Everyone I dealt with was incredibly rude, aggressive and abusive... mind you I had a young son with me!||Completely ruined our experience and weekend. I would recommend the motor inn or swansea beach chalets... Other family had amazing experiences there. ||This place is not worth the money. Go somewhere else where you will be spoken too and treated with a bit of respect.

We stayed here for two nights in a motorhome after Christmas, the park is beautiful. Very well maintained. Has easy access to the beach behind the park. The toilets and showers are free, very clean. We stayed at Scamander and St Helens, this park is by far the best. Thank you for great memories.

A great place to stay. It simple, clean and priced well. We booked a large group late and they did what they could to fit us all in. We will definitely be back again, more than once.
Thank you

I recently stayed at Swansea Holiday Park with my partner and had a great time. The cabin was very clean and felt new, with everything we needed for a comfortable stay. The cleanliness was impressive, and all the facilities worked well. The location and amenities made our holiday even better. I highly recommend Swansea Holiday Park for anyone looking for a relaxing and easy getaway.

I fully appreciate cancellation policies,  however also appreciate some compassion and understanding to be shown when plans must change due to a family death.  Unfortunately this was not the case from Swansea Holiday Park. Didn't get the chance to stay here,  and won't.

Lovely park with great location right opposite to the beach!! We stayed in a 2 bedroom chalet, while travelling with our 1.5 year old son.

Positives
- entire park and the ammenities are super clean
- ammenities include a common area with kitchen, BBQ, washing machines and dryers, common bathrooms and toilets
- the chalet is provided with all necessities and is clean and well maintained
- location is wonderful - peaceful and quiet. Very close to cafes, restaurants and supermarkets. Right opposite to the beach.

Negatives
- I found the chalet to be very tiny for staying multiple days. We somehow managed for 2 night stay but anything more would become uncomfortable.

Lovely spot to unwind and relax in a little luxury after camping in some remote places, less than a minute's walk to the beach which is very quiet and great for swimming. Great facilities including hot showers, drinking water, clean toilets, kitchen, BBQ, sofas, TV, plug sockets to charge everything up. Lovely, friendly staff and I would've stolen Lola the dog from reception at checkout if I'd been given the chance, lovely little pup that she is.
Very good CV spot. Top class grass. V.clean facilities

By far the NICEST accommodation we had the whole trip. Check in was a breeze and I got to do laundry here! $4 for the washer and $4 for the drier in $1-2 coins. We got to use their bbq, sitting area, common room, it was LOVELY! Plus little duckies were walking around which was so cute!
Stayed in our RV over night receptionist was lovely and very helpful amenities were absolutely spotless cleanest caravan park we have ever stayed at highly recommend

A lovely park in a beautiful location. Grassed areas make for an easy setup on the flat gravel pads.
The facilities were faultless. Clean and tidy with everything you need.
A short walk into town if you need anything. We loved our weekend, thank you.
Clean facilities

離沙灘很近 進國家公園前的好地方
有些營地不平

Even though we arrived too late (only starting October are they open until 6pm, which is clearly stated at the reception) our keys were waiting for us together with all the information we needed to get around the camping. Amenities were pristine clean and the shared area fully equipped. Access to the beach was a plus!

Fantastic caravan park, located across from the beach with clean and up to date ammenities (with heaters!) and spacious showers. Beautiful grassed sites, well maintained and cared for by friendly and meticulous owners. Highly recommend!
Excellent location, just across the road from the beach. Great friendly staff and Caravan Park. I'll definitely be going back for a longer stay. 😁
Super cozy cabins, very clean and tidy. Will come back again.
Beautiful cosy seaside and beautiful views to explore.

I love this camping spot - really the very best. Super clean, great laundry, amazing toilets & showers, next to the beach (loved listening to the sea at night) well looked after & the customer service - 10/10
I don’t want to leave - thank you!!!

Excellent amenities and grounds. Secure for children and dogs. (Dog wash also there!)
We stayed in our Van, the cabins look good also.

We had one night stay at the Holiday Park during our trip to Tessie in Feb. We got there late, and found it pretty impressive with the park's after hours arrangement. No hassle at all.  Our accommodation was a two-bedroom cabin, which was decent, equipped with everything we needed for a comfortable stay, like air con, cookware, sofa, fridge etc. Sure, there were a couple of minor drawbacks, like one of bedroom doors was unable to lock and stay closed, hinge was squeaking loudly at night time when the door opened itself. Also it seems a winter duvet was provided at summer time, it is much heavier & thicker than others. As for the park facilities we did not stay long enough to experience all of them, especially the beach behind the Park. Overall, good value for money, we will stay longer next time if we have a chance to visit Swansea again.
Partner and I had an unexpected stay here and were very impressed with the staff, cleanliness and facilities in the cabin. Would recommend.

Do not stay here, park host where rude and un accomodating. I have stayed at heaps of caravan parks this was by far the worst caravan park I have ever stayed at! Nothing for kids to do, no ball games no bikes, no park.
Rude, very unaccomidating, to many rules don’t waste your time or money worst caravan park in Tasmania BY FAR!!!!
Spacious room with all the facilities you could need. Bed comes with heater and is very comfortable. A very lovely stay!

Lovely! So clean and fresh and beautifully maintained. Fresh green lawns in van spaces. Great kitchen and cooking facilities and a private bathroom if you need it. Even a veggie and herb garden. And did I say clean!? 🤩 probably not aimed primarily at families but for singles or couples it’s a haven.

Very good caravan park that ticks all the boxes, large easy to park van sites managers very helpful and friendly beach access from park is convenient for walks and only a few minutes from town centre. Highly recommend.
Great place near the sea
Loved it

Very affordable prices.
Spotless amenities & the park was very peaceful & quiet, the sound of the waves at night is also nice.
The staff were also so lovely.
The cleanest caravan park, and loveable staff. This is a caravan park for those who value mutual respect. Great location and worth the price - hot shower extra divine if you've been without :P
Very handy and accessible park. All sites are easy to access and in good condition. Reception staff very friendly and helpful. Recommended as a destination in Swansea

We stayed in a motorhome hence the no stars rating on rooms. This park is beautiful from the lawns to the buildings and amenities. There is no ocean view because of a fence which is appreciated for protection from the wind. You just need to go out the fence and the view is stunning looking across to Coles Bay. Every caravan park should learn from the amenities especially the showers as they have everything eg storage for shampoo ect and great showers. Also was greeted by a lovely lady.

Showed up early by accident on a Sunday but was still given a ready cabin by the fantastic ladies at reception. The cabins were pristine and surprisingly spacious. The chocolates in the beautifully appointed small loungeroom was a great surpise. Can't recommend them enough
Must be very quiet at night after sunsets.

This holiday park was truly memorable in every possible way. The toilets and laundry rooms were very clean and easy to use as well as the showers. It was very peaceful listening to waves from the beach crash against the shore I would highly recommend this place as a great holiday destination.
Comfortable, warm and cozy cabin in safe park. Close to Swansea and great spot by the sea. Friendly staff
Excellence in all aspects. The owners are justifiably proud of this park. Grassed sites, spotless amenities and a fabulous camp kitchen. All you could want, need and wish for. Highly recommended.
Great location,close to amenities,shops beaches
Great cheapish accommodation,  for an over night stay, easy access to the beach, great service, food and restaurants close by

Stayed at a Powered site here last night and couldn’t recommend more. Staff were so friendly and the ammenities were all very clean and family friendly. A high chair was available for our use, which was the only camp to provide one during our stay in Tassie. Really family friendly atmosphere, lovely grassy sites which were big and loved hearing the waves at night. We loved our stay here and will definitely be back. From Forbes, NSW.
